social:piasnews-social-9a17b8402eb40b2f:.source_text: "on the basis that you have oscar and lando, if max was available, you wouldn't sign him?" zak brown: "no, no. lando and oscar have their names engraved on their race seat and they haven't emptied out their lockers, so they're not going anywhere." https://t.co/NgcSxvyQYV
social:piasnews-social-9a17b8402eb40b2f:.zh: “既然你有奥斯卡和兰多，如果马克斯也在的话，你就不会签下他了吧？”扎克·布朗说道：“不，不。兰多和奥斯多已经把名字刻在了他们的座位上，而且他们也没有清空过储物柜，所以他们不会离开的。”https://t.co/NgcSxvyQYV

social:piasnews-social-0c8544ac6cbeffa0:.source_text: "LN or OP, who'd you trust more to be ceo of mcl for a day?" ZB: OP "who'd you least wanna be stuck in a lift with?" ZB: LN. we've known eo for 10 years, we're tired of eo "best dressed?" ZB: LN "biggest diva?" zb: they dont make diva demands but you kinda feel like LN would https://t.co/uY0EdXSvbF
social:piasnews-social-0c8544ac6cbeffa0:.zh: “LN 还是 OP，你会更信任谁来担任 MCL 的 CEO 一天呢？”ZB 回答：OP。“你最不希望和谁一起乘坐电梯呢？”ZB 继续问：LN。我们认识 EO 已经十年了，我们已经受够了 EO 那种“最装扮得漂漂亮亮的”作风。ZB 补充说：“最大的派对女王是谁呢？”LN 回答：“他们不会提出什么特殊要求，不过感觉 LN 会更合适一些。”https://t.co/uY0EdXSvbF

social:piasnews-social-bc669baed8214ead:.source_text: "we've got two awesome drivers. no intention of a different lineup. our plan is to keep going with what we've got." "you gotta know what the market's doing but we're not in the market. lando and oscar won 14 for us last year and i'm looking forward to the next 14." https://t.co/V8SfKpynot
social:piasnews-social-bc669baed8214ead:.zh: “我们有两位出色的车手。没有打算改变车队阵容。我们的计划是继续依靠现有的车手。” “你必须了解市场的情况，但我们的目标并非要参与市场竞争。兰多和奥斯卡去年为我们赢得了 14 场胜利，我期待着接下来的 14 场比赛。” https://t.co/V8SfKpynot

social:piasnews-social-60b611ad633db5db:.source_text: zak brown praises oscar's approach to racing! "my biggest problem in racing was i was very emotional. (...) when i look at the talent of oscar, when he has a bad day, he just shrugs it off. (...) all i would have done is being pissed off, which doesnt set you up for success." https://t.co/lqGO2ftDu4
social:piasnews-social-60b611ad633db5db:.zh: 扎克·布朗称赞了奥斯卡在比赛中的表现方式！“我在比赛中的最大问题就是情绪过于敏感。……当看到奥斯卡状态不佳时，他只是选择忽略这些情绪。而我，只会情绪暴躁，而那样显然无法帮助我取得胜利。”https://t.co/lqGO2ftDu4

social:piasnews-social-d8241a7fbd19ba07:.source_text: zak brown on f1 silly season and whether he'd like to keep the mclaren lineup: "i want continuity. i'd love lando to finish his career here, same thing with oscar, and be teammates... i'd like that. but it has to work." https://t.co/y34lRmcZiN
social:piasnews-social-d8241a7fbd19ba07:.zh: 扎克·布朗在 F1 赛季开始时提出了这样一个问题：他是否希望继续留在迈凯伦车队？他回答说：“我希望保持连续性。我希望兰多能在这里结束他的职业生涯，奥斯卡也是如此。同时，我也希望他能继续与队友一起比赛……不过这一切都得符合实际情况才行。”https://t.co/y34lRmcZiN

social:piasnews-social-d97bec7a06196ecd:.zh: 从 P7 到 P4 #迈凯伦 F1 | #奥地利大奖赛 🇦🇹 https://t.co/bCvRffcjUQ

social:piasnews-social-3852815e942e6b48:.source_text: 📻Well done mate, that's a really phenomenal drive, great drive! Really good job Oscar, that's exactly what we were looking for. 🐝Yeah that was a bit better than last race, nice. Good job everybody, that was a tough afternoon, I've still got a bit of pace to make up but thanks guys for all the effort the last couple of weeks. I think that is pretty good evidence that it's paid off. So thank you, let's do that every time~Thank you~
social:piasnews-social-3852815e942e6b48:.zh: 📻干得真棒，朋友！这真是一次出色的驾驶表现，太好了！奥斯卡，你做得非常出色，这正是我们想要的。🐝是的，这次的表现比上一次比赛还要好，真是令人满意。大家辛苦了，今天真是艰难的一天，我还需要努力来弥补一些差距，但感谢大家在过去几周所付出的努力。我觉得这充分证明了我们的努力是值得的。所以，谢谢你们，让我们每次都能做到这样吧~谢谢！

social:piasnews-social-98397422c8838d81:.source_text: oscar said baku 2024 is the race he'd most like to relive among his own races 🥹🫶🏻 "it was a really exciting, very nerve-wracking win. if i was going to relive it, i'd want to go into the race not knowing. crossing the line that day was very special." https://t.co/Z9THVEAj6J
social:piasnews-social-98397422c8838d81:.zh: 奥斯卡说，2024 年布卡大赛是他最想再次参加的一场比赛🥹🫶🏻 “那是一场非常刺激、充满紧张感的胜利。如果可以重来一次，我希望在比赛开始之前就一无所知。那天冲过终点线真是特别难忘。” https://t.co/Z9THVEAj6J
